message: Built landing-page manifest, bucket object manifest, download-status manifest, and explicit primary snRNA input manifest. Ran in offline manifest-reuse mode.
Built region inventories from manifests and local files.
Normalized snRNA donor-region objects and computed HVG vote tables.
Annotated normalized snRNA objects or wrote explicit annotation templates.
Spatial QC now uses Xenium cell_feature_matrix + cells tables as primary section inputs, with explicit path audits and anomaly reports.
Spatial mapping writes explicit section-level cell-type assignments or an explicit no-reference status.
Built graph-ready artifacts: node metadata, node features, edge tables, and serialized payloads for snRNA cells and spatial patches.
Aggregated graph and composition summaries into patient-level features.
Prepared GraphSAGE manifests from available graph and patient artifacts.
Generated QC plots, graph-input diagnostics, outlier summaries, and donor-sampled spatial embedding checks.
Generated snRNA audit tables and markdown summary under results/check.
